source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Aspen Leaf
identity.motif: golden aspen leaves and white bark

typography: Inter for dense collaboration UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, calm headings, readable tables, and precise dashboard numerals.
layout: 8px radius components, bark-paper panels, leaf-vein separators, sky-blue focus rings, golden action states, compact navigation, and collaboration dashboards arranged on an 8px grid.

prompts.label: Transparent Aspen Leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Aspen Leaf transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated aspen leaf motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact cluster of quaking aspen leaves on a slender white aspen bark twig, golden yellow leaf faces with subtle amber veins, pale cream leaf backs, crisp serrated rounded leaf edges, small dark bark lenticels, and very slight sky-blue reflected highlights along a few cool edges. Accurate botanical form and natural leaf texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show several overlapping leaves and the short twig without cropping; clean silhouette suitable for background removal.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves golden yellow leaves, white bark, sky-blue highlights, and fine vein texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second plant species, no maple leaves, no oak leaves, no flowers, no green-screen color in the subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Aspen Leaf" / "Aspen Leaf", derived from the visible transparent aspen leaf motif: golden yellow rounded aspen leaves, white aspen bark with dark lenticels, pale cream leaf backs, sky-blue edge highlights, and mountain grove neutrals.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the aspen motif. The board must visibly respect only motif-derived colors: golden yellow leaves, warm amber veins, white bark, pale cream leaf backs, sky blue highlights, slate-gray mountain shadows, soft grove neutrals, and restrained light collaboration accents.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide. Use a precise product UI grid with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Aspen Leaf", motif story, palette swatches, type scale, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style collaboration system. Use 8px card radius, crisp thin borders, leaf-vein dividers, bark-paper surfaces, sky-blue focus rings, golden primary actions, cream panels, mountain grove gray text, small collaborative avatars and presence dots derived from yellow/blue/bark colors.
Specific components: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, breadcrumb/sidebar/top nav, search command palette, data table, kanban/task row, metric dashboard, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips.
Typography: include English labels and Japanese examples such as "共同編集", "検索", "状態", "見出し" with clean multilingual product UI guidance.
Texture: subtle aspen leaf vein pattern and white bark lenticel grain, low contrast and tactile.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no dark mode, no neon, no random brand names, no misspellings, no watermark, no animals, no maple leaves, no oak leaves, no flowers.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Aspen Leaf" / "Aspen Leaf", translated from the visible light board and the same transparent aspen motif. It must feel like the same light collaboration system adapted for dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, 8px radius, leaf-vein dividers, white-bark surfaces, golden leaf primary actions, sky-blue focus rings, and mountain grove neutrals from the Aspen Leaf motif and light board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Aspen Leaf", Dark Mode, palette swatches, type scale, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Dark visual system: deep mountain grove charcoal background derived from bark shadows, warm cream text from pale leaf backs, dark bark cards, muted slate-gray borders, golden yellow active states, amber chart data, sky-blue focus and information states, pale bark highlights, leaf-vein separators, subtle aspen leaf vein texture and white bark grain.
Specific components: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, breadcrumb/sidebar/top nav, search command palette, data table, kanban/task row, metric dashboard, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token chips.
Typography: include English labels and Japanese examples such as "共同編集", "検索", "状態", "見出し" with clean multilingual product UI guidance.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels only, no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no misspellings, no watermark, no animals, no maple leaves, no oak leaves, no flowers.
